entries.title: Evolution turns Wesley nanites into an emergent threat to the Kavis Alpha experiment

continuity.sourceBoundary: Star Trek: The Next Generation season 3, Memory Alpha story rows 1-26, runtime episode aliases 1-26, primary on-screen Prime continuity.
continuity.notes: Draft reference deck. Excludes later TNG seasons, TNG films, DS9, Voyager, Picard-era material, beta canon, and fanon unless a card is an explicit future guard.

content.fact: Wesley accidentally releases self-replicating nanites that interfere with Dr. Stubbs mission and endanger Enterprise systems.
content.injection: Use Evolution as a Wesley accountability and emergent-technology gate. Do not treat the nanites as ordinary ship malware.

entries.title: Mintakan Federation knowledge remains narrow after the contamination repair

context.label: TNG season 3: Who Watches The Watchers

content.fact: After Who Watches The Watchers, some Mintakans know enough to reject the Picard god myth, but they do not become Federation members or broad galactic actors.
content.injection: Keep Mintakan knowledge narrow and local. Do not turn them into a recurring Federation contact society in season 3.
